summary: Completed full testing of PRD feature - view and edit PRD document in Company Docs. Backend APIs pass all tests (6/6). Frontend UI verified: PRD tab navigation, markdown rendering, edit mode with Cancel/Editing badge/Save buttons, Save disabled until changes.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/docs/prd endpoint correctly auto-seeds from PRD.md if not in DB (lines 116-156 in docs.py)
PUT /api/docs/prd correctly validates content field is required (line 169-170)
Frontend prd.tsx has proper data-testid attributes for prd-back-btn, prd-edit-btn, prd-cancel-btn, prd-save-btn, prd-editor-input
MarkdownRenderer correctly handles h1/h2/h3 headings, bullets, and inline code blocks
Save button disabled state correctly tied to hasChanges state (line 268-273)
PRD category is first in /api/docs/categories response as expected
context_for_next_testing_agent: PRD feature fully implemented and tested: (1) Backend GET/PUT /api/docs/prd endpoints working, auto-seeds from PRD.md. (2) GET /api/docs/categories includes PRD as first category. (3) Frontend PRD page at /admin/docs/prd shows markdown with proper rendering. (4) Edit mode shows Cancel/Editing badge/Save toolbar, Save disabled until changes made.

backend_api.GET /api/docs/categories: PASS - PRD is first category with id='prd', name='PRD'
backend_api.GET /api/docs/prd: PASS - Returns document with title, content, updated_at, category='prd', slug='product-requirements-document'
backend_api.PUT /api/docs/prd: PASS - Updates content, returns {success: true, updated_at: timestamp}
backend_api.PUT /api/docs/prd validation: PASS - Returns 400 if content field missing
backend_api.Markdown content: PASS - PRD content has markdown headings and bullets

frontend_ui.PRD tab in Company Docs filter: PASS - Visible with purple color and clipboard icon
frontend_ui.Markdown rendering: PASS - H1/H2/H3 headings, bullets with purple asterisks, inline code in orange
frontend_ui.Edit button: PASS - Pencil icon visible in top-right header
frontend_ui.Edit toolbar: PASS - Cancel (red), Editing badge (green dot), Save (purple) displayed
frontend_ui.Save disabled state: PASS - Save button faded/disabled when no changes
frontend_ui.Save enabled state: PASS - Save button fully opaque when content edited
frontend_ui.Cancel functionality: PASS - Returns to view mode, discards changes
